How does anxiety help?
 Does feeling anxious sometimes help you
to accomplish a goal, meet a deadline,
make an important decision, take a
worthwhile risk?
 Does feeling anxious immobilize you and
stop you in your tracks so that emotional
movement and forward direction
become impossible.

Anxiety has a
personality
 References are internal or
external?
 Relationship driven or self
focused?
 Expresses by taking in (GUILT)
 Expresses by giving out (BLAME)
 Replays past or present thoughts/
memories
 Worries about future events/
possibilities

-- 13 of 39 --

Ripple Effect
 How many other people does your
anxiety effect?
 Who gets to benefit from your anxiety?
 Does someone get to be the rescuer?
 Who gets hurt by the anxiety?
 Is their a child involved?
 Does a spouse or parent feel guilt about
the anxious person?
Anxiety is shared	14

Assign Meaning
Anxiety may be seen as incredible caring
A person who is able to worry deeply can
also love deeply
The darker the fear the brighter the hope
Every person has two opposite sides
A very pessimistic person may hope more
than an optimistic one
The only difference is they hide their hope
The SI Coach finds hope, love and meaning
